mapper.sql: id, country_code, country_name, account, password, api_url, backup_api_url, heartbeat_status, enable_status, api_available, last_heartbeat_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_account_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_account_config WHERE deleted = 0 AND enable_status = 1 AND api_available = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_account_config ( country_code, country_name, account, password, api_url, backup_api_url, heartbeat_status, enable_status, api_available, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{countryCode}, #{countryName}, #{account}, #{password}, #{apiUrl}, #{backupApiUrl}, #{heartbeatStatus}, #{enableStatus}, #{apiAvailable}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_account_config
country_code = #{countryCode}, country_name = #{countryName}, account = #{account}, password = #{password}, api_url = #{apiUrl}, backup_api_url = #{backupApiUrl}, enable_status = #{enableStatus}, api_available = #{apiAvailable}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_account_config SET heartbeat_status = #{heartbeatStatus}, last_heartbeat_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_account_config SET api_available = #{apiAvailable}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_account_config SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
